claim: Accessory genome is the dominant predictive signal
evidence: Direction C shows accessory genes often outperform core SNP and Direction O modules rely heavily on accessory features
limitation: Core SNP matrix/phylogeny was not the strongest but may still matter for lineage-aware validation
what_to_do_next: Use accessory as main signal but keep lineage validation as robustness check

claim: One fixed pipeline is not optimal for all antibiotics
evidence: Direction O selects different best modules for AMP/AUG/AXO/CHL/FOX
limitation: Module selection is based on limited 5-drug original panel
what_to_do_next: Expand external panel and test learned module-selection rules

claim: Adaptive feature fusion improves original 5-drug performance
evidence: Direction O improves F1 in 4/5 drugs compared with paper-ready50 baseline
limitation: Not all metrics improve; AUPRC and balanced accuracy changes are mixed
what_to_do_next: State the claim as F1-focused and report all metrics

claim: Drug metadata helps simulated new-drug generalization
evidence: Direction R mean F1 improves from 0.729 genome-only to 0.844 genome+chemical
limitation: Only 5 original drugs means chemical generalization is limited
what_to_do_next: Add more external antibiotics and train a real genome-drug model

claim: External validation supports proof-of-concept beyond original data
evidence: Direction T/U/V validate TET/CIP/STR/GEN/NAL using BV-BRC/PATRIC features
limitation: External feature space differs from original paper-ready feature space
what_to_do_next: Build a unified annotation pipeline across original and external data

claim: Leakage checks are present but not final proof
evidence: Direction V includes cluster-aware split similarity diagnostic and negative control near balanced accuracy 0.5
limitation: Annotation-Jaccard clusters do not fully rule out lineage leakage

evidence: Direction W/X identify weak direct quinolone keyword interpretation and mutation-driven resistance risk
limitation: Current proxy features are not true mutation calling
what_to_do_next: Add gyrA/gyrB/parC/parE mutation tokens or AMRFinderPlus/CARD/ResFinder outputs

evidence: Direction E/B show many stable features are unknown or weakly annotated
limitation: Keyword matching is not enough for mechanistic claims
